description_long: This is a compact, single-engine military-style airplane with a short, rounded fuselage and a low-mounted straight wing configuration. The exterior is painted in a camouflage brown with white stripes and insignia on the wings and tail, suggesting a historical or vintage design. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a small canopy visible. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a tailwheel landing gear arrangement. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is prominent at the front. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century fighter aircraft, with robust construction and minimal external features.
description: A compact, vintage-style military airplane with a brown camouflage finish, low-mounted straight wings, and an enclosed forward cockpit. Features include a nose-mounted propeller, conventional tail, and tailwheel landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded fuselage, low-mounted wing, and tailwheel; white insignia and stripes are visible on the wing and tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, tailwheel, and the vertical stabilizer; both wing insignias are visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the propeller and engine cowling partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, engine cowling, and the enclosed cockpit canopy; both wings and insignias are clearly visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main wheels and a tailwheel, fixed gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small canopy.
